description: @EnableEurekaServer activates Netflix Eureka — all microservices register here, gateway resolves lb:// URIs via this registry.
Dedicated discovery microservice — central service registry enabling location transparency and dynamic scaling in the MSA.
Eureka server tracks service health via heartbeat — automatically deregisters unhealthy instances from the registry.
@EnableEurekaServer meta-annotation enables the full Eureka server auto-configuration with minimal boilerplate.
